name: Polyglutamic Acid
description: An incredibly powerful humectant that holds 10x more moisture than hyaluronic acid.
scientificSummary: A naturally occurring polymer made of gamma-linked glutamic acid units, discovered in the fermentation of Bacillus subtilis (natto).
mechanismOfAction: Forms a thin, breathable film on the surface of the skin that locks in moisture and prevents evaporation.

seo.title: Polyglutamic Acid - The Moisture Powerhouse | Dew Theory
seo.description: Experience the ultimate hydration with Polyglutamic Acid, the next generation humectant.
